title: Lilith not yet labeled 2nd Angel in Rebuild might be Tabris
display_title: Lilith not yet labeled 2nd Angel in Rebuild might be Tabris
wikitext:
[]: Lilith not yet labeled 2nd Angel in Rebuild -might be Tabris Post by Angel of Will » Mon Apr 09, 2012 8:08 pm I think the wiki should label Lilith as the ?th Rebuild angel. Lilith's status as an 'angel' has not yet been mentioned- and may not ever be mentioned. And so we should keep '2nd Angel status' open to whatever may be thrown at us in the last two movies. Since Kaworu is around at least as early as we see him, it is possible that he might be the official 2nd Angel. Either that, or it could even be something still unrevealed. Rebuild only has 12 Angels total, right? If Lilith DOES count as #2 then we're only looking forward to one new one. If not, 2.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Apr 09, 2012 9:12 pm CRC identifies Lilith as 2nd. Forgot my pic SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 10, 2012 12:04 am Evangelion 1.XX wrote: Shinji: This is...! It can't be... An Eva? Misato: Not quite. The giver of life to this planet, and its bringer of death. The Second Angel, Lilith .

[]: Post by Angel of Will » Tue Apr 10, 2012 5:38 am : O I failed. (Lock?)

[]: Re: Lilith not yet labeled 2nd Angel in Rebuild -might be Ta Post by Xous » Tue Apr 10, 2012 6:32 am Angel of Will wrote: Rebuild only has 12 Angels total, right? If Lilith DOES count as #2 then we're only looking forward to one new one. If not, 2.

[]: Post by Angel of Will » Tue Apr 10, 2012 8:02 am Oh, huh. Another mistake of mine. You're right (and no problem- the topic was a still-born anyway. May as well squeeze something out of it.) So there are 3 angels besides Kaworu left. That's one more than what remained at this point in the original series.

[]: Post by Xous » Tue Apr 10, 2012 8:57 am Angel of Will wrote: So there are 3 angels besides Kaworu left. That's one more than what remained at this point in the original series.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Apr 10, 2012 10:39 am It's honestly a question we won't know the answer to until the film comes out. Perhaps Ramiel was included in those 8 Angles Gendo mentions (they sure hadn't beaten it when the line was said) and there's always a possibility the captured 3rd Angel who Gendo wanted destroyed could be included in that number as well. Anywho, we'll see soon.
